mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.work_order_id, p.step_id, p.photo_url, p.thumbnail_url, p.gps, p.taken_time, p.uploaded_by, p.create_time, u.real_name AS uploaded_by_name FROM work_order_photo p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.uploaded_by AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE p.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.work_order_id, p.step_id, p.photo_url, p.thumbnail_url, p.gps, p.taken_time, p.uploaded_by, p.create_time, u.real_name AS uploaded_by_name FROM work_order_photo p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = p.uploaded_by AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE p.step_id = #{stepId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM work_order_photo WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND deleted = 0
